title: 10 Slots / Only Hotbar
description: You can only access your hotbar and every other inventory slot is locked
body:
# About
- Your inventory is restricted to your hotbar, offhand, and equipment only. Every other slot is unusable, and attempting to place an item in it will drop the item.
- Base Datapack - [UIM Minecraft](https://modrinth.com/datapack/uim-minecraft-hotbar-only)

# Things Changed
- Only your hotbar, offhand and equipment is accessible and every other inventory slot is blocked.
- If you have Barrier blocks in your world then you should make a new world.
- No animal or mob get killed.

# Multiplayer Support
- It works fine with Multiplayer Server and has been tested with a server with 15 people.
